sentences.en: Wash your hands as soon as you get home.
sentences.zh: 一回到家就先去洗手。
sentences.ipa: /wɑʃ jɔr hændz æz sun æz ju ɡɛt hom/

sentences.en: Use a spoon for your yogurt.
sentences.zh: 優格要用湯匙吃。
sentences.ipa: /juz ə spun fɔr jɔr ˈjoɡɚt/

sentences.en: Hang your towel up after your bath.
sentences.zh: 洗完澡把毛巾掛起來。
sentences.ipa: /hæŋ jɔr ˈtaʊəl ʌp ˈæftɚ jɔr bæθ/

sentences.en: Hold the map and help me find the way.
sentences.zh: 拿著地圖，幫我找路。
sentences.ipa: /hold ðə mæp ænd hɛlp mi faɪnd ðə we/

sentences.en: Let's play catch with the ball.
sentences.zh: 我們來玩傳接球吧。
sentences.ipa: /lɛts ple kætʃ wɪð ðə bɔl/

sentences.en: Pack your lunchbox in your bag.
sentences.zh: 把便當盒裝進書包裡。
sentences.ipa: /pæk jɔr ˈlʌntʃbɑks ɪn jɔr bæɡ/

sentences.en: Read the passage out loud once.
sentences.zh: 把這段文章大聲念一次。
sentences.ipa: /rid ðə ˈpæsɪdʒ aʊt laʊd wʌns/

sentences.en: Lend your friend one of your toys.
sentences.zh: 借一個玩具給你的朋友玩。
sentences.ipa: /lɛnd jɔr frɛnd wʌn ʌv jɔr tɔɪz/

sentences.en: Tell me how you're feeling right now.
sentences.zh: 告訴我你現在的感覺。
sentences.ipa: /tɛl mi haʊ jʊr ˈfilɪŋ raɪt naʊ/

sentences.en: No means no, please stop asking.
sentences.zh: 不行就是不行，別再問了。
sentences.ipa: /no minz no pliz stɑp ˈæskɪŋ/

sentences.en: You listened so well today, thank you.
sentences.zh: 你今天好會聽話，謝謝你。
sentences.ipa: /ju ˈlɪsənd so wɛl təˈde θæŋk ju/

sentences.en: Don't run with scissors in your hand.
sentences.zh: 不要拿著剪刀跑。
sentences.ipa: /dont rʌn wɪð ˈsɪzɚz ɪn jɔr hænd/

sentences.en: Get some rest so you feel better.
sentences.zh: 好好休息，你就會好一點。
sentences.ipa: /ɡɛt sʌm rɛst so ju fil ˈbɛtɚ/

sentences.en: Give Grandpa a hug when he arrives.
sentences.zh: 爺爺來的時候給他一個抱抱。
sentences.ipa: /ɡɪv ˈɡrænpɑ ə hʌɡ wɛn hi əˈraɪvz/

sentences.en: Say hello to your new classmate.
sentences.zh: 跟你的新同學打聲招呼。
sentences.ipa: /se həˈlo tə jɔr nu ˈklæsmet/

sentences.en: Cover your mouth when you sneeze.
sentences.zh: 打噴嚏的時候要摀住嘴巴。
sentences.ipa: /ˈkʌvɚ jɔr maʊθ wɛn ju sniz/

sentences.en: The sun is bright, wear your sunglasses.
sentences.zh: 太陽很大，戴上太陽眼鏡吧。
sentences.ipa: /ðə sʌn ɪz braɪt wɛr jɔr ˈsʌnˌɡlæsɪz/

sentences.en: Let's play a board game instead of the phone.
sentences.zh: 我們玩桌遊，別玩手機了。
sentences.ipa: /lɛts ple ə bɔrd ɡem ɪnˈstɛd ʌv ðə fon/

sentences.en: Help me decorate the birthday cake.
sentences.zh: 幫我裝飾生日蛋糕。
sentences.ipa: /hɛlp mi ˈdɛkəret ðə ˈbɝθde kek/

sentences.en: Let's find your favorite book on the shelf.
sentences.zh: 我們在書架上找你最喜歡的書吧。
sentences.ipa: /lɛts faɪnd jɔr ˈfevərɪt bʊk ɑn ðə ʃɛlf/
